title: Analysis code for "Beyond Income: Subjective Social Class, Psychological Resources, and Quality of Life in South Korea During the COVID-19 Pandemic"
description: R and Python code reproducing all analyses (structural equation models, competing-model comparison, and robustness checks including common-method-variance controls) and figures for the study. The underlying microdata are not redistributed; they are publicly available from the Korea Social Science Data Archive (KOSSDA, dataset A1-2021-0003). No personally identifiable information is included.
